headline: BROKER MEDICINES, LEGALLY
subheading: Register with the MHRA, master GDP brokering and pass inspection without ever holding stock.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial conceptual illustration of a pharmaceutical broker as the trusted intermediary in the medicines supply chain, set against a deep navy background. Two luminous nodes on opposite sides representing an authorised supplier and an authorised recipient, connected only by a glowing teal and cyan contractual link that arcs between them while a stylised, translucent medicine carton passes directly between the two without touching a central point, conveying negotiation without physical possession. In the centre, a refined floating verification checkmark and a subtle ledger of layered transaction records rendered as clean glowing cyan lines, symbolising counterparty qualification and ALCOA+ documentation as the only inspectable evidence. Faint geometric network lines and a delicate molecular double-helix motif thread through the composition, with a single fresh-green accent highlighting the compliant connection. Soft volumetric light, brushed glass and metal surfaces, shallow depth of field with creamy teal bokeh, calm premium clinical-luxury mood. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
